title: Weldomcor Pack of 5 Artificial White Garland 40 FT Flower Garland Roses Vines Silk Flowers Outdoor Hanging Artificial Flowers Decoration for Wedding Arch Bedroom Wall Backdrop Garden Decoration
features: 💒【Packaging and Size】 The package contains 5 pieces of artificial flower garland. Each rose garland is 2.45 meters long, the flower has a diameter of 4 cm, these 5 pieces of rose vines are swollen enough to decorate your room.

🎁【Premium Materials】 The flowers and leaves of the vivid white flower garland are made of soft silk cloth, the stems are made of durable plastic. No glue. The petals are naturally curved, simulating the shape of a real flower, lifelike. The flowers and leaves are not easy to fall off, and you can bend the branch easily.

💒【Rich Application】Artificial flower garland decorations can create a romantic and fairy-tale atmosphere for your life. Suitable for many scenes such as wedding arch, birthday party, anniversary, Valentine's Day. Flower vine can be used to decorate dining table, gardens, fences, sheds, swing frames, rattan chairs, air conditioner pipes, exposed wires, stairs, shops, restaurants, offices, etc.

🎁【Design Elements】 These white rose garlands are made with exquisite craftsmanship, focusing on details, natural and fresh color, generous and elegant, look like real flowers, beautiful and practical. The wedding flowers garland will decorate your home cozy and fresh and make you feel surrounded by love.

💒【Easy to Care】Fake rose garlands do not require much care and maintenance, do not need watering and no dead leaves. These rose vines artificial garlands are the perfect choice for someone who does not have time to take care of fresh flowers. Nice gift for your family and friends.
description: Product Description Weldomcor White Roses Artificial Garland for Wedding Arch Bedroom Wall Backdrop Garden Decoration If you want to give your lover an unforgettable wedding. Weldomcor Weldomcor is an innovative company specialising in home decoration. We are committed to providing the best shopping experience for every customer. Weldomcor light up your life. Table Centerpiece Our artificial flower vines have been upgraded to look more agile, three dimensional, realistic and not clumsy at all. Decorate the center of the table with romantic rose vines. Wedding Arch White roses represent first love and eternal love, which are perfect and beautiful decorations for wedding, house, garden ect.
